turns.text: Thanks for calling Sears Home Services — what appliance can I help you with today?
Hi, my washer is having problems.
What's the brand/model, and what's happening?
Got it — tell me more about what's happening and when it started.
Won't drain, water pooling at the bottom of the tub, for the past three days.
Any error codes or unusual sounds?
It's showing error code 5E, and it's making a grinding noise during the spin cycle.

That code and sound point to a specific fix: power-cycle the washer at the breaker for 60 seconds to clear error code 5E, then check for the source of a grinding noise during the spin cycle before running another cycle.
Let us know if that doesn't clear it up!

symptoms.description: won't drain, water pooling at the bottom of the tub
symptoms.sound: a grinding noise during the spin cycle

steps_given: Power-cycle the washer at the breaker for 60 seconds to clear error code 5E.
Inspect for the source of a grinding noise during the spin cycle before running another cycle.
